title: Melty Spicy Ukrainian Cheese Bake
description: A spicy and satisfying Ukrainian dish featuring a blend of cheeses and oyster sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. It is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the oyster sauce, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, cheese mixture, and sour cream, stirring until the cheese is well coated.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the macaroni with additional shredded cheese if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
